patches.summary: Fix riepilogo/storico table % guard, province aggregation, scraper default, unused max(), watch interval, module paths, workflow archive.
patches.reason: Greptile P1: riepilogo/storico rendered '%' for empty percentage; riepilogo overwrote PercAffluenza; TotaleElettori never populated; scraper default returned ScrutinioCompleto. P2: unused max(), watch interval. Copilot: module paths, workflow archive no-op.
